query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS worker_progressions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  workerId INT,
  workerType ENUM('w2_employee', 'contractor') NOT NULL,
  currentStage ENUM('w2_employee', 'senior_employee', 'contractor', 'certified_contractor', 'business_owner', 'house_member') DEFAULT 'w2_employee' NOT NULL,
  stageEnteredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  previousStage ENUM('w2_employee', 'senior_employee', 'contractor', 'certified_contractor', 'business_owner', 'house_member'),
  previousStageExitedAt TIMESTAMP,
  readinessScore INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  nextStageEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  nextStageBlockers JSON,
  mentorId INT,
  mentorAssignedAt TIMESTAMP,
  primaryDepartmentId INT,
  secondaryDepartments JSON,
  qualityScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  onTimeDeliveryRate DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  clientSatisfactionScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalRevenueGenerated DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  targetStage ENUM('w2_employee', 'senior_employee', 'contractor', 'certified_contractor', 'business_owner', 'house_member'),
  targetDate TIMESTAMP,
  careerNotes TEXT,
  linkedBusinessId INT,
  linkedHouseId INT,
  luvLedgerAccountId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS worker_progressions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

  workerType ENUM('w2_employee', 'contractor') NOT NULL,

  stageEnteredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  previousStage ENUM('w2_employee', 'senior_employee', 'contractor', 'certified_contractor', 'business_owner', 'house_member'),
  previousStageExitedAt TIMESTAMP,
  readinessScore INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  nextStageEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  nextStageBlockers JSON,
  mentorId INT,
  mentorAssignedAt TIMESTAMP,
  primaryDepartmentId INT,
  secondaryDepartments JSON,
  qualityScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  onTimeDeliveryRate DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  clientSatisfactionScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalRevenueGenerated DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  targetStage ENUM('w2_employee', 'senior_employee', 'contractor', 'certified_contractor', 'business_owner', 'house_member'),
  targetDate TIMESTAMP,
  careerNotes TEXT,
  linkedBusinessId INT,
  linkedHouseId INT,
  luvLedgerAccountId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
